message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first tiered-scrollback summary collection (tick 266)

Migrates the per-pane tiered-scrollback summary fetch loop in
`collect_pane_tiered_scrollback_summaries` (runtime.rs L3600) to the
cx-first sibling:

- `wezterm_handle.pane_tiered_scrollback_summary(pane_id)` →
  `pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx(&summary_cx, pane_id)`

Loop-shared `summary_cx` declared above the `for pane_id in pane_ids`
iteration, resolved once via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
(tick 249/255/265 pattern — single cx resolve covers N iterations
rather than N per-iteration resolves).

The `_with_cx` variant on the `WeztermInterface` trait routes through
cx-aware MuxPool dispatch in each of the WeztermClient/WeztermHandleSource
impls. This helper is called from the spawned tiered-scrollback
telemetry sampling loop (runtime.rs L1820) — a cx-cancel during sampling
now cleanly aborts the fan-out instead of probing every pane.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 80 (187-266).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 44 (runtime 10 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 10 + workflows/runner 1
+ workflows/account_steps 1 + tx_execution 3 + simulation 1
+ workflows/wait_execution 2 + wezterm trait ext 1 + recording 2).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
